chatbot.label: AI Chatbot / Conversational Agent
chatbot.description: Full chatbot system with NLP, multi-channel, analytics, and deployment

agents.prompt_engineer: Specialized in crafting system prompts, few-shot examples, and guardrails for chatbot responses
agents.test_agent: Automated conversation testing — happy paths, edge cases, adversarial inputs, hallucination detection
agents.analytics_agent: Tracks conversation metrics: resolution rate, CSAT, escalation rate, intent coverage gaps
agents.security_agent: Prompt injection detection, PII filtering, content moderation rules

custom_skills_to_create.name: chatbot-prompt-engineering
custom_skills_to_create.description: Design system prompts, guardrails, tone guidelines, and few-shot examples for conversational AI

custom_skills_to_create.name: chatbot-testing
custom_skills_to_create.description: Generate test conversation scripts, adversarial inputs, edge cases, and regression suites for chatbots

custom_skills_to_create.name: chatbot-analytics
custom_skills_to_create.description: Track and analyze chatbot KPIs: resolution rate, CSAT, escalation %, intent gaps, conversation length

hooks.PostToolUse: After editing conversation flow or prompt files, auto-run test conversations via Playwright
hooks.SessionStart: Load conversation design context and check for unresolved user complaints in analytics

claude_md_additions: ## Chatbot Architecture
- Intent recognition pipeline: user message → NLU → intent classifier → response generator → output filter
- Guardrails: PII detection, prompt injection defense, hallucination checks, toxicity filter
- Multi-channel: Web widget, Slack, Discord, WhatsApp, Telegram with unified backend
- Analytics: Track resolution rate, CSAT, escalation %, avg conversation length, intent coverage

required.name: github

hooks.PostToolUse: After contract edits, run compliance checks and flag missing clauses or risky terms
hooks.SessionStart: Load contract templates and recent regulatory updates for context

claude_md_additions: ## Legal Tech Architecture
- Contract lifecycle: Draft → Review → Negotiation → Execution → Monitoring → Renewal
- Compliance monitoring: Regulatory database → Obligation mapping → Audit procedures → Reporting
- Risk assessment: Contract risk scoring, litigation probability, regulatory violation flags
- Document management: OCR, entity extraction, semantic search, version control with audit logs

claude_md_additions: ## Marketing Architecture
- Campaign funnel: Awareness → Consideration → Conversion → Retention → Advocacy
- Attribution: First-touch, last-touch, multi-touch, incrementality testing across channels
- Content strategy: Brand voice, messaging pillars, content calendar, distribution channels
- Analytics: CTR, conversion rate, CAC, LTV, ROAS, engagement rate, segment performance

agents.smart_contract_agent: Design, audit, and deploy smart contracts with security best practices and gas optimization
agents.defi_agent: Manage liquidity pools, yield strategies, price feeds, and protocol economics
agents.nft_agent: Manage NFT minting, metadata, marketplaces, and royalty distribution
agents.security_agent: Audit contracts for vulnerabilities, reentrancy, front-running, and exploit patterns

custom_skills_to_create.name: web3-smart-contract-design
custom_skills_to_create.description: Design and implement secure smart contracts with proper access controls, auditing, and gas optimization

custom_skills_to_create.name: web3-defi-protocol
custom_skills_to_create.description: Design DeFi protocols: AMM, lending, yield strategies, tokenomics, and economic modeling

custom_skills_to_create.name: web3-nft-architecture
custom_skills_to_create.description: Design NFT systems: metadata standards, minting mechanisms, marketplaces, and royalty distribution

custom_skills_to_create.name: web3-security-audit
custom_skills_to_create.description: Audit smart contracts for vulnerabilities: reentrancy, overflow, access control, front-running

hooks.PostToolUse: After smart contract code changes, run static analysis and security checks
hooks.SessionStart: Load blockchain network status, gas prices, and recent security incidents

claude_md_additions: ## Web3 Architecture
- Smart contract layers: Protocol (core logic) → Integration (adapters) → Frontend (user interface)
- Security: Formal verification, automated audits, multi-sig governance, circuit breakers, emergency pauses
- DeFi primitives: AMM (constant product formula), lending (collateralization), derivatives (perpetuals, options)
- Token standards: ERC-20 (fungible), ERC-721/1155 (NFTs), ERC-1967 (proxies), ERC-2612 (permit signatures)
- Network economics: Gas optimization, MEV resistance, cross-chain bridges, liquidity incentives

custom_skills_to_create.name: social-moderation-strategy

hooks.PostToolUse: After feed algorithm changes, validate against engagement metrics and quality scores
hooks.SessionStart: Load community guidelines, recent moderation decisions, and trending content analysis

claude_md_additions: ## Social Platform Architecture
- Feed system: Personalized ranking → Diversity filters → Spam/quality → Caching → Delivery
- Real-time: WebSocket connections → Activity streams → Notifications → Presence tracking
- Moderation: ML detection (spam, abuse) → Human review queue → Appeals → Enforcement (shadow ban, suspension)
- Engagement: Feed ranking, notifications, recommendations, creator incentives, gamification
- Monetization: Premium features, creator payouts, ads, sponsored content, virtual gifts
